# Onboarding: Commits Skill

This guide helps you write conventional commits and maintain a clean history.

## Quickstart Checklist

1. Read SKILL.md for commit rules and patterns.

2. Use tools/ for linting (e.g. commitlint, validate-commits.py).

3. See examples/README.md for commit message patterns.

## Troubleshooting

- **Commit rejected?**

- Check for correct type/scope/subject and message format.

## Resources

- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md)

- [examples/README.md](examples/README.md)

- [tools/](tools/)
